# Proof-Settlement Lifecycle Console v36

A browser-local public demonstration of the AGIJobManager / GoalOS settlement rail:

`Request -> Escrow -> Execute -> Proof -> Validate -> Settle -> Chronicle`

The page teaches three public rules:

- No ProofBundle, no settlement.
- No replay, no settlement.
- No authority, no autonomy.

The page is a local simulator only. It does not connect a wallet, approve tokens, move funds, broadcast transactions, certify facts, or grant production authority.
